title: Nostalgic School Graduation Photo AI
sourceTitle: Nostalgic School Graduation Photo AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a reusable nostalgic school graduation photo with controlled variables while preserving the source prompt's visual recipe. theme: A reusable nostalgic school graduation photo built around 1990s city high school. student group: mixed adult reenactment group, nostalgic class portrait. wardrobe: white shirts, navy pants, simple backpacks. photo texture: slightly faded film print with soft grain. composition: stable composition, clear focal subject, organized supporting elements, balanced negative space, and no clutter. style: Realistic photography or editorial photo language with natural materials, controlled retouching, and believable lighting. restrictions: no watermark, no random extra text, no distorted anatomy, no copied copyrighted composition, adult subjects only, no face swap, no real-person likeness unless the user owns or has consent for the image Keep the visual style consistent with the template while changing only the listed variables.
